label: A안 — 인물+구체 사건 (🏆 승리 공식)
prompt_en: Photorealistic dramatic portrait of a Korean stockbroker in a dark navy suit, face showing intense shock and disbelief, mouth slightly open, hands gripping his head. Behind him, a massive digital stock market display board showing bright red numbers cascading downward with '8%' prominently visible. The trading floor environment is dimly lit with dramatic red and amber emergency lights. His expression captures the moment of a circuit breaker halt. Cinematic lighting, high contrast, tension atmosphere. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance.

label: B안 — 차트/오브젝트 중심
prompt_en: Photorealistic image of two massive stone pillars cracking and crumbling in a grand marble hall resembling a stock exchange. The pillars are labeled with glowing holographic logos suggesting semiconductor chips. Red emergency lights flash throughout the hall. Debris falling, dust clouds, dramatic collapse moment captured mid-action. One pillar shows '50.7%' etched into it. Dark navy and deep red color palette with gold accents on the architectural details. Cinematic wide shot, dramatic tension. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance.
key_figure: Two crumbling pillars (metaphor for Samsung+SK Hynix)

label: C안 — 와일드카드 (다른 인물)
prompt_en: Photorealistic dramatic portrait of Hock Tan, Broadcom CEO, Asian-American man in his 70s with silver hair and glasses, wearing a dark suit, standing at a podium with a stern concerned expression. Behind him, a massive screen showing a stock chart with a sharp 20% decline arrow in bright red. The Broadcom logo is subtly visible. Dark moody corporate setting with dramatic side lighting creating deep shadows. His hand is raised as if explaining or defending. Tension and gravity in the atmosphere. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void.
